{{Quote|The only time I have ever seen a zenji needle was after it had been thrown at my head. I don't know who had targeted me for the attack (or even who threw the ''flarging'' thing) but I spent weeks in a bacta tank healing up. The five other guards in the room weren't as lucky…I was the only survivor of the attack. Don't be fooled by the primitive appearance of the zenji needle. In the right hands, it is an extremely deadly weapon.|[[Isham]]|<ref name="GFT" />}}
'''Zenji needles''' were custom-made throwing weapons employed by the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]]s. Zenji needles were ten [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] long, lacquered and decorated with a [[Gemstone/Legends|jewel]] at one end. The jewel added weight and balance to the weapon. Zenji needles were usually worn as decorative [[Hair/Legends|hair]] ornaments. Mistryl Shadow Guards were particularly adept with these weapons and could throw them with pinpoint accuracy, Zenji needles were known to be able to crack [[Armor/Legends|armor]] when thrown with enough force.<ref name="GFT" />

Lacquered zenji needles were worn by the Mistryl Shadow Guard [[Shada D'ukal]].<ref name="TLCSB">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref> A individual known as [[Isham]], a patron of [[Gundark's Gear Datalog]], survived a zenji needle attack but needed several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] treatment to recover.<ref name="GFT" />
